post.summary: This service is to add new device information to NMS system.
This service is to upload device DLMS keys to NMS system, so that NMS system can use the uploaded keys to authenticate with the end device.
This service is used disable end device to block all operations for the device.
This service is used enable end device to allow all operations for the device.
This service is to update device information to system.
This service is to assign schedule read group code to device
This service is used to get the status of the endpoint job (ReadLogicalDeviceName / PingDeviceAsync)
This service is used to get names of all registered Manufactures for the authorised suppliers.
This service is used to update name of the manufacturer registered in System.

requestBody.description: This contains the manufacturer which needs to be updated based on Code

post.summary: This service is used to get names of all registered suppliers for the authorised suppliers.
This service is used to update name of the supplier registered in System.
This service is used to get all Dlms companion information which are supported by NMS system.
This service is used to get all Dlms services information which are supported by NMS system.
This service is used to update a Dlms services configuration for a particular device model variant.
This service is used to get all Obis codes information.
This service is used to update a description of an obis code for a particular device model variant.
This service is used to update a description of an obis code for a particular device model variant.
This service is used to create a new device model variant.

requestBody.description: This is used to get spect

post.summary: This service is used to update a device model variant.

requestBody.description: This is used to get spect

post.summary: This service is used to get all device model variant information.
This service is used to add role for a particular device model variant. Roles will be used to extract desired credentials to execute a DLMS service on the device.
This service is used to update role for a particular device model variant. Roles will be used to extract desired credentials to execute a DLMS service on the device.
This service is used to get all roles for a device model variant.
